description_long: This is a stylized chibi doll with long, flowing platinum blonde hair adorned with a white headpiece featuring wing-like extensions and a central yellow star. The doll has large, expressive blue eyes and a wide, cheerful smile. She wears a pink dress with petal-like layers, white and gold accents, and small yellow stars attached to the hem and sleeves, giving a magical or celestial appearance. Her arms are outstretched, with one hand raised in a playful gesture, and she wears white gloves and boots with gold trim. The overall design is whimsical and fantasy-inspired, reminiscent of magical girl anime characters. The surface appears smooth and slightly matte, with soft, rounded features and no visible joints.
description: A chibi-style magical girl doll with long blonde hair, a pink petal dress, and star-themed accessories. The doll has large blue eyes, a cheerful smile, and a whimsical, fantasy-inspired appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's expressive face, blue eyes, open mouth, and detailed dress with star accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the volume and flow of the long hair, as well as the layered dress and outstretched arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length and shape of the hair, the back of the dress, and additional star decorations.
description_view_3: Angled rear view reveals the hair's thickness, the side of the headpiece, and the doll's dynamic pose.
attribute_clothing_style: Magical girl-inspired outfit with a layered pink petal dress, white gloves, white boots with gold trim, and yellow star embellishments, evoking a fantasy or anime aesthetic.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with one arm raised and bent at the elbow, the other arm extended outward, head facing forward, and legs slightly apart in a dynamic, playful stance.
attribute_facial_expression: Smiling with wide open mouth, large blue eyes open and bright, and eyebrows in a neutral, cheerful position.
attribute_hair_style: Long, thick, platinum blonde hair with soft waves, parted in the center, and adorned with a white winged headpiece and a yellow star.
